case_title: HELENA GALATOLO VS. CORNELIUS ROSS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALATOLO, HELENA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSS, CORNELIUS DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE $6,334.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,439.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT ANITA ROSS, DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED FEB-27-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, ANITA DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ANITA ROSS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-12-2014 AT 8:30 AM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, CORNELIUS DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE ROSS, ANITA DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GALATOLO, HELENA AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, CORNELIUS DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE ROSS, ANITA DBA RETROSPECT FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GALATOLO, HELENA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-12-2014 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUSTIN SISCO, PROPERTY MANAGER, APPEARS ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (304)
